dashboard.label: HTML Renderer — Showcase
dashboard.description: Live examples of the HTML Renderer custom visualization.
dashboard.definition:
{"title": "HTML Renderer — Showcase", "description": "Live examples of the HTML Renderer custom visualization.", "visualizations": {"md_title": {"type": "splunk.markdown", "options": {"markdown": "# HTML Renderer — Showcase Render **arbitrary HTML** inside Dashboard Studio: inline SVG, theme-aware styling, `{{field}}` interpolation from searches, and (optionally) live scripts. The built-in *Markdown* viz strips most of this; *Image* can embed a static SVG via data-URI but gives you no interpolation, theme variables, or interactivity."}}, "md_1": {"type": "splunk.markdown", "options": {"markdown": "### 1. Theme-aware static HTML Uses the exposed CSS variables `--text`, `--bg`, `--accent`. `allowScripts` is **off** (default, sanitised)."}}, "viz_theme": {"type": "viz-html-renderer.html_renderer", "options": {"htmlTemplate": "

Theme-aware card

This panel uses --text, --bg and --accent so it follows the dashboard theme automatically. Toggle the dashboard between light and dark to see it adapt.

", "theme": "auto", "allowScripts": false}, "title": "Theme-aware card"}, "md_2": {"type": "splunk.markdown", "options": {"markdown": "### 2. `{{field}}` interpolation Bound to a search returning one row (`region, intensity, status, updated`). Each `{{field}}` is replaced with the first-row value — build live KPI tiles with no JavaScript."}}, "viz_kpi": {"type": "viz-html-renderer.html_renderer", "options": {"htmlTemplate": "
{{region}} carbon intensity
{{intensity}} gCO2/kWh
{{status}}
Updated {{updated}}
", "theme": "auto", "allowScripts": false}, "title": "KPI tile (data-bound)", "dataSources": {"primary": "ds_kpi"}}, "md_3": {"type": "splunk.markdown", "options": {"markdown": "### 3. Inline SVG A hand-written SVG gauge — exactly what the Markdown viz removes. Strokes use `var(--accent)` so the SVG is themed too."}}, "viz_svg": {"type": "viz-html-renderer.html_renderer", "options": {"htmlTemplate": "
", "theme": "auto", "allowScripts": false}, "title": "Inline SVG gauge"}, "md_4": {"type": "splunk.markdown", "options": {"markdown": "### 4. Status badges Flexbox + pill badges, mixing literal hex colours and the theme `var(--accent)`. Pure HTML/CSS, sanitised."}}, "viz_badges": {"type": "viz-html-renderer.html_renderer", "options": {"htmlTemplate": "
OperationalDegradedDownMaintenance
", "theme": "auto", "allowScripts": false}, "title": "Status badges"}, "md_5": {"type": "splunk.markdown", "options": {"markdown": "### 5. Live script (`allowScripts = true`) With scripts enabled, inline `", "theme": "auto", "allowScripts": true}, "title": "Live clock"}, "md_note": {"type": "splunk.markdown", "options": {"markdown": "### Image viz vs HTML Renderer You *can* embed a **static** SVG in the built-in **Image** viz via a `data:image/svg+xml` URI. Reach for **HTML Renderer** when you also need: `{{field}}` interpolation from search results, theme-aware CSS variables, interactive scripts, or arbitrary multi-element layout (cards, badges, grids)."}}}, "dataSources": {"ds_kpi": {"type": "ds.search", "options": {"query": "| makeresults | eval region="UK", intensity=142, status="Moderate", updated=strftime(now(),"%H:%M")"}, "name": "KPI sample"}}, "defaults": {"dataSources": {"ds.search": {"options": {"queryParameters": {"earliest": "-24h@h", "latest": "now"}}}}}, "inputs": {}, "layout": {"tabs": {"items": [{"layoutId": "main", "label": "Showcase"}]}, "globalInputs": [], "layoutDefinitions": {"main": {"type": "absolute", "options": {"width": 1200, "height": 1430, "display": "auto"}, "structure": [{"item": "md_title", "type": "block", "position": {"x": 20, "y": 20, "w": 1160, "h": 120}}, {"item": "md_1", "type": "block", "position": {"x": 20, "y": 160, "w": 420, "h": 200}}, {"item": "viz_theme", "type": "block", "position": {"x": 460, "y": 160, "w": 720, "h": 200}}, {"item": "md_2", "type": "block", "position": {"x": 20, "y": 380, "w": 420, "h": 200}}, {"item": "viz_kpi", "type": "block", "position": {"x": 460, "y": 380, "w": 720, "h": 200}}, {"item": "md_3", "type": "block", "position": {"x": 20, "y": 600, "w": 420, "h": 200}}, {"item": "viz_svg", "type": "block", "position": {"x": 460, "y": 600, "w": 720, "h": 200}}, {"item": "md_4", "type": "block", "position": {"x": 20, "y": 820, "w": 420, "h": 200}}, {"item": "viz_badges", "type": "block", "position": {"x": 460, "y": 820, "w": 720, "h": 200}}, {"item": "md_5", "type": "block", "position": {"x": 20, "y": 1040, "w": 420, "h": 200}}, {"item": "viz_clock", "type": "block", "position": {"x": 460, "y": 1040, "w": 720, "h": 200}}, {"item": "md_note", "type": "block", "position": {"x": 20, "y": 1260, "w": 1160, "h": 130}}]}}}}
